issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' for Blocker mechanics, not 'OnAttacked'. Blocker is a reactive ability that activates when opponent declares an attack.

Condition references 'HasRestingDon' but the effect requires paying DON!! cost (−1). The cost should be represented as an action to spend DON!!, not a condition to have them resting. This is a cost mechanism, not a conditional check.
Missing the DON!! payment action. The effect requires 'DON!! −1' as a cost before the ReturnToHand effect can resolve. Need to add action to consume/return DON!! to deck.
